content.full_text:
May 1, 1990

MEMORANDUM

TO: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
FROM: GALEN LARSON, COUNTY CLERK
SUBJECT: CAMPAIGN DISCLOSURE CONTRIBUTIONS

Please answer the following questions:

If a county adopts an ordinance providing to pay all or part of the costs of printing, handling, translating and mailing a candidate's statement of qualifications, is that considered a contribution by the county to the candidate's campaign?

Are there any prohibitions in the Political Reform Act that would prevent the county from adopting such an ordinance?

I would appreciate any information you can send me regarding this matter. Send it to Betty Vaughan, Fresno County Elections Department, 2221 Kern, Fresno, CA 93721.

By Betty Vaughan
Elections Activities Coordinator
